title: Xenon D1S 35W HID Headlight Ballast 89034934 4L0907391 Factory OEM Direct Replacement Control Unit Module Fits for BMW 128i for Audi Q7 for GMC Acadia for Volvo S60 XC90
features: OEM Dierect Replacement: Pack of 1 piece Premium quality HID Ballast OEM design factory headlight control module unit; the replacement ballast is not original unit but is fully Plug-and-Play and designed to exceed all OE specifications to deirectly replace the old one.

Compatible Replacement for: 4L0907391 ballast replacement for 2007 2008 2009 Audi Q7, 2008 2009 2010 2011 2012 2013 BMW 1-series (Coupe and Convertible), 2008 2009 2010 2011 2012 Buick Enclave, 2007 2008 2009 2010 2011 2012 GMC Acadia, 2008 2009 2010 2011 2012 2013 Jeep Grand Cherokee, 2006 2007 2008 2009 2010 2011 2012 Jeep Commander, 2009 2010 2011 2012 Mitsubishi Eclipse, 2007 2008 2009 Volvo S60, 2010 2011 2012 2013 Volvo XC60.

Notice: Please verify your factory ballast and connectors matches the product on the image exactly before placing an order. Certain manufacturers may change the ballast type when there is a mid-cycle refresh or new production date.

Warning: Please note that the most common reason for failure is water in the headlight. If you headlight has water in and your ballast has failed because of it, you may need a new headlight as a replacment ballast will fail again.
description: OEM Replacement Digital HID Xenon Ballast is a simple, affordable way to replacement your defective ballast. Our ballast feature the best and latest reverse polarity protection and shock protection system which reduces installation issues and improves longevity. The installation is virtually fail-safe and is plug and play. Please notice that this item is for a piece of (1X) HID ballast only; not a complete kit, does not include HID bulb. Features & Specs: - High quality German technology - Ultra Slim Digital Ballasts - 100% Waterproof, vibration/shock proof - Power: 35W - Input voltage: DC 12V - Striking voltage: 23000V - Working temperature: -25 C to 40 C - Working lifetime: >5000 hours Replace OEM Number : Valeo LAD6G, 89034934, 89076976, VAL43731, 043731 Interchange Part Number: 4L0907391, 4L0 907 391, 4L0907391A, 63117180050, 15849727, 68051669AA, 8301B395, 30784923, 6224L8, 6235488, 7701208945 Item Compatible with: for 2007-2009 Audi Q7 for 2008-2013 BMW 1-series for 2008-2012 Buick Enclave for 2007-2012 GMC Acadia for 2008-2013 Jeep Grand Cherokee for 2006-2012 Jeep Commander for 2009-2012 Mitsubishi Eclipse for 2007-2009 Volvo S60 for 2010-2013 Volvo XC60 for 2007-2014 Volvo XC90 for 2008-2010 VW Passat for 2007-2011 VW Eos
